title: June 13
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 13''' is the 164th day of the year (165th in leap years), with 201 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1929|1929]] – [[Ralph McQuarrie]] is born.
*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Jon D'Agostino]] is born.
*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[Malcolm McDowell]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Stellan Skarsgård]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[R.J. Palacio]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Fred Tatasciore]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 68|''Star Wars Weekly'' 68]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 52|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 52]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Droids (1995) 3|''Droids '' 3]] published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Star Wars Tales 8]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – [[Star Wars Insider 88|''Star Wars Insider'' 88]] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Legacy (2006) 13|''Legacy'' (2006) 13]] published.
*2007 – [[Rebellion 7|''Rebellion'' 7]] published.
*2007 – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 8]]'' published.
*2007 – [[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 3|''Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 3'']] published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[The First to Strike]]'' fifth adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*[[2012]] – [[Knight Errant: Escape 1|''Knight Errant: Escape'' 1]] published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[The Droids Re-Animated]]'' Part 1 published on the [[StarWars.com]] blogs.
*[[2018]] – [[Thrawn 5|''Thrawn'' 5]] published.
*2018 – [[Darth Vader (2017) 17|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 17]] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Star Wars Insider 219]] published.
